metadata.name: Bootstrap K3s Cluster with k3sup
metadata.description: Bootstraps a K3s cluster from the Ansible control machine by using k3sup over SSH. Supports first-server install, optional agent joins, and local or remote kubeconfig placement.

items.name: secrets_file
items.title: Secrets File
items.description: Optional vars file to load before running the playbook.

items.name: install_k3sup_binary
items.title: Install k3sup
items.description: Download and install the k3sup binary on the Ansible control machine before bootstrapping

items.name: k3sup_version
items.title: k3sup Version
items.description: Version of k3sup to install when binary installation is enabled

items.name: k3sup_install_path
items.title: k3sup Path
items.description: Local filesystem path for the k3sup binary

items.name: bootstrap_control_plane
items.title: Bootstrap Server
items.description: Run k3sup install against the first K3s server

items.name: k3s_server_host
items.title: Server Host
items.description: Inventory host name for the first K3s server

items.name: k3s_server_user
items.title: Server SSH User
items.description: SSH user used by k3sup for the first server

items.name: k3s_server_ssh_port
items.title: Server SSH Port
items.description: SSH port used for the first server

items.name: k3s_server_ssh_key_path
items.title: SSH Key Path
items.description: Optional private SSH key path for k3sup

items.name: k3s_context_name
items.title: Cluster Context
items.description: kubectl context name written into the generated kubeconfig

items.name: k3sup_use_sudo
items.title: Use sudo
items.description: Run k3sup remote operations with sudo on the target hosts

items.name: extra_server_args
items.title: Server Args
items.description: Optional extra K3s server arguments passed through k3sup

items.name: join_agent_nodes
items.title: Join Agents
items.description: Join matching inventory hosts to the cluster as K3s agents

items.name: k3s_agent_hosts_pattern
items.title: Agent Hosts
items.description: Inventory host pattern used to discover K3s agent nodes

items.name: k3s_agent_user
items.title: Agent SSH User
items.description: SSH user used by k3sup for agent nodes

items.name: k3s_agent_ssh_port
items.title: Agent SSH Port
items.description: SSH port used for agent nodes

items.name: extra_agent_args
items.title: Agent Args
items.description: Optional extra K3s agent arguments passed through k3sup

items.name: kubeconfig_destination_mode
items.title: Destination Mode
items.description: Store the generated kubeconfig locally on the control machine or copy it to another managed host

items.name: local_kubeconfig_path
items.title: Local Kubeconfig
items.description: Local kubeconfig path used when destination mode is local

items.name: kubeconfig_remote_host
items.title: Remote Host
items.description: Managed inventory host that should receive the kubeconfig copy

items.name: kubeconfig_remote_path
items.title: Remote Kubeconfig
items.description: Destination path on the remote host for the kubeconfig file

items.name: kubeconfig_remote_owner
items.title: Remote Owner
items.description: Owner for the remote kubeconfig file

items.name: kubeconfig_remote_group
items.title: Remote Group
items.description: Group for the remote kubeconfig file

items.name: kubeconfig_remote_mode
items.title: Remote Mode
items.description: Filesystem mode for the remote kubeconfig file

items.name: kubeconfig_remote_become
items.title: Remote Become
items.description: Use become when creating directories or copying the remote kubeconfig
